description: Create a compression spring in FreeCAD with a helix radius of 9 mm (measured to the center of the wire), a helix pitch of 5 mm, 8 turns (total helix height of 40 mm), and a circular wire cross-section with a radius of 1 mm. The spring should be a solid shape created by sweeping the circular profile along the helix path. Save the completed model to ~/Documents/FreeCAD/compression_spring.FCStd.
